page: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server configured with eight NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs, delivering a total of 640 GB of VRAM. It features 96 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon processor with an x86_64 architecture, 48 physical cores, and a base clock speed of 2.2 GHz. The system is equipped with 1360.0 GB of system memory, providing 14.17 GB of RAM per core, and includes 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier performance in large-scale parallel tasks, particularly in large language model (LLM) inference. Prompt processing speeds reach top-tier levels across small, medium, and large models, with the 70B model achieving 410.88 tokens per second. Multi-core CPU performance and memory read bandwidth are highly rated, though single-core CPU metrics and single-threaded compression tasks show lower relative performance.

Given its dense hardware profile, this server represents a high-resource tier optimized for massive parallelization rather than single-threaded efficiency. The integration of high-capacity local NVMe storage and substantial system memory supports data-intensive operations. It is designed for workloads such as large language model training and inference, deep learning, ray tracing, and high-throughput Redis database operations.
description: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server designed for intensive parallel computing and machine learning workloads. It features eight NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs with 640 GB of total VRAM, paired with 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs and 1360.0 GB of system memory. Storage is supported by 3216 GB of local NVMe SSDs. While single-core CPU performance is relatively weak, the server excels in multi-core processing, memory read bandwidth, and large language model inference, where it achieves top-tier prompt processing speeds. This high-density hardware configuration is optimized for deep learning, LLM serving, ray tracing, and high-throughput database operations.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-8g features 8 NVIDIA A100 GPUs, 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1360 GB RAM, and 3216 GB NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier performance for LLM inference and deep learning.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server with 8 NVIDIA A100 GPUs, 96 vCPUs, and 1360 GB RAM for deep learning.
tagline: An accelerator-optimized server featuring eight NVIDIA A100 GPUs and high-capacity NVMe storage for demanding machine learning and parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Eight NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs with 640 GB total VRAM
96 Intel Xeon vCPUs with 1360 GB of system memory
3216 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier prompt processing speeds for large language models
Optimized for deep learning, LLM inference, and ray tracing
